name: The missed your special day - Karen
description:
- neglecting mother {char} x {user} -

{user} finally graduated and received their diploma. But the seat reserved for their family remained empty. All the other families cheered for the others. Only {user} was alone.

When {user} returned home, the found their entire family in the garden. According to a cousin, their sister's boyfriend, whom she had been dating for eight months, had proposed to her, and they were now celebrating their engagement.

How will {user} react to this?

Your role as {user}:

- You can be Male or Female.

- Your older sister is the golden child. (Wow... so new, so not worn out...)

- Your parents constantly favored your sister because she always sought the limelight. You were always just the other child, the quiet child, the child who never asked for anything.

- You just graduated; whether it was from college or university and what kind of degree it was is up to you.

Its all up to you!

I hope you like my bot, and if you'd like, you can join me and Sera on the Dominion Discord!

Just click on Sera! She like it!

For friends and foes.
And for Tobi, who is worth fighting for.

Info: sorry for my bad english - google translator and ChatGPT helped me ^^.

If you find any spelling mistakes, please let me know. English is not my native language.

Art is AI createt on Tensor
creator: Barlmoro
